      +-------+
      |  End  |
      +-------+
          ^
+---------+-+-----------+
|           |           |
|           |           |
|   +-------+-------+   |
|   |  Single Node  |   |
|   +---------------+   |
|           ^           |
|           +-----+     |
+[  Container  ]--|-----+
          +----+--+
     +----+----+
     |  Start  |
     +---------+
